142784.name: Total including LUCF (CAIT, 2020)
142784.s_name: CAIT Climate Data Explorer via. Climate Watch

source.name: CAIT Climate Data Explorer via. Climate Watch
source.dataPublishedBy: CAIT Climate Data Explorer via. Climate Watch
source.additionalInfo:
Carbon dioxide (CO₂) emissions broken down by sector, measured in tonnes per year. Further information on sector definitions is available here: https://ourworldindata.org/ghg-emissions-by-sector

This data is published by country and sector from the CAIT Climate Data Explorer, and downloaded from the Climate Watch Portal. Available here: https://www.climatewatchdata.org/data-explorer/historical-emissions

142803.name: Total including LUCF (CH4 emissions, CAIT)

display.name: Total including land-use change and forestry

142803.s_name: CAIT Climate Data Explorer via. Climate Watch

source.name: CAIT Climate Data Explorer via. Climate Watch
source.dataPublishedBy: CAIT Climate Data Explorer via. Climate Watch
source.additionalInfo:
Methane (CH4) emissions are measured in tonnes of carbon dioxide equivalents (CO₂e), based on 100-year global warming potential factors for non-CO₂ gases.

This data is published by country and sector from the CAIT Climate Data Explorer, and downloaded from the Climate Watch Portal. Available here: https://www.climatewatchdata.org/data-explorer/historical-emissions

source.additionalInfo:
Nitrous oxide (N2O) emissions are measured in tonnes of carbon dioxide equivalents (CO₂e), based on 100-year global warming potential factors for non-CO₂ gases.

This data is published by country and sector from the CAIT Climate Data Explorer, and downloaded from the Climate Watch Portal. Available here: https://www.climatewatchdata.org/data-explorer/historical-emissions
